name: Roast Quail with Juniper Berries II (Relish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the orange and lime skins into a 1/4-inch dice.
2. Set aside the diced fruits.
3. Tie the ginger, cinnamon sticks, chili, and vanilla bean in cheesecloth and set aside.
4. Place sugar in a heavy large skillet with straight sides.
5. Stir constantly over high heat until sugar turns light amber.
6. Break up lumps as you go; if there are still lumps after it begins to color, work over low heat or off heat until the mixture is smooth.
7. Stir in the orange and lime, and cook over high heat for 5 minutes.
8. Fold in raisins and cranberries, stirring gently to coat with caramelized sugar.
9. Cook over medium heat, stirring gently, until about half of the cranberries pop open (about 10 minutes).
10. Remove from heat and cool.
11. Spoon the relish into sterilized jars and cover tightly.
12. Refrigerate for up to 1 month. The relish keeps about 3 months.
